live.name: Afcons Infrastructure
live.summary: Afcons Infrastructure Limited is the flagship infrastructure and engineering company of the Shapoorji Pallonji Group.
live.businessOverview: The company has a strong track record of executing complex EPC projects across marine, surface transport, urban infrastructure, and hydro segments. They operate globally with projects in over 25 countries.
risks: High dependence on government projects and geopolitical stability.
Significant debt levels which the IPO aims to partially address.
Fixed-price contracts exposed to raw material price volatility.
strengths: Part of the prestigious Shapoorji Pallonji Group.
Diverse project portfolio and healthy order book of over ₹31,000 Cr.
Proven execution capability in high-complexity projects.
live.interestReason: Investors are keen on the SP Group's de-leveraging narrative and India's continued infrastructure push.
live.listingWatch: Analysts expect a steady listing with potential long-term growth as debt levels normalize.

live.name: Greenship Recycling
live.summary: A specialized player in industrial recycling and circular economy solutions.
live.businessOverview: The company focuses on sustainable waste management and metal recovery, catering to industrial giants looking to improve their ESG scores.
risks: Regulatory changes in waste management can impact margins.
strengths: First-mover advantage in niche industrial recycling.
Strong margins due to proprietary recovery processes.
live.interestReason: High interest due to 'Circular Economy' thematic momentum.
live.listingWatch: Strong grey market interest suggests a potential multibagger listing.

upcoming.name: Swiggy Limited
upcoming.summary: India's leading food delivery and quick-commerce platform.

upcoming.name: Sagility India
upcoming.summary: A provider of technology-enabled business solutions for the healthcare industry.
